## Improvement Description

Describe the improvement you are suggesting.

---

## Affected Area

- [ ] Repository structure / folder organization
- [ ] Naming convention consistency
- [ ] Index or registry accuracy
- [ ] Cross-reference consistency between files
- [ ] Terminology alignment with PMBOK 8 Lexicon
- [ ] Schema consistency across artifact definitions
- [ ] README or documentation clarity
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## Current State

Describe what currently exists and why it is suboptimal.

---

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the improvement clearly. If it affects multiple files, list them.

---

## Files Affected

- `[file path 1]`
- `[file path 2]`

---

## Expected Benefit

How will this improvement benefit users of the repository (PM practitioners, AI agents, book authors, MCP server consumers)?

---

## PMBOK 8 Alignment

Does this improvement affect PMBOK 8 sourced content? If so, cite the relevant section.

- [ ] No PMBOK 8 content affected
- [ ] PMBOK 8 content affected — Source: `[section reference]`
